rationale: Review 1's findings are directly on the generality rubric: AlgPoints is genuinely restricted to k-valued points when the natural definition should range over an arbitrary R (confirmed at line 42), and ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup are vacuously defined with `True` fields (confirmed at lines 63 and 70), meaning they capture no mathematical content at any generality level. Review 2's findings — minimizing variable assumptions on IsUnipotent and deleting a redundant instance — are real but tangential to generality; acting on Review 1 produces a substantially more mathematically meaningful API.
